name: All-Day Beans
recipeIngredient: 2 tsp Dried crushed red chili peppers
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the beans and discard any blemished ones.
2. In a heavy saucepan or slow cooker with a capacity of 3 to 4 quarts, bring water to a boil.
3. Add in the beans and cook briskly for 2 minutes.
4. Turn off the heat, cover, and let soak for 1 hour.
5. Add onion, garlic, crushed chilies, bouillon, and pork. Bring to a boil over high heat.
6. Reduce heat to its lowest setting and simmer tightly covered for 5 hours and 30 minutes or until tender. Add water as necessary.
7. Salt can be added at the end if desired.
8. Goes well with hamburgers or barbecue. It can also be served in bowls with a mound of salsa on top.
